title: Non-residents living in and outside Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Non-residents living in and outside Canada
Get information on rental income and non-resident tax, international students, seasonal workers.

## Services and information

### Applying for an individual tax number (ITN)
Information for non-residents individuals who need an individual tax number, who can apply, when to apply, what documents you need, and how to apply

### Non-residents of Canada
Do you have income from sources in Canada? What are your obligations, and your reporting and filing requirements?

### Rental income and non-resident tax
Non-residents who receive rental income from Canada, electing to file a tax return under Section 216 of the Income Tax A

### Seasonal agricultural workers from other countries
Seasonal agricultural workers from other countries, Canadian employers of seasonal agricultural workers, liaison officers

### International students
This page provides basic information about the income tax rules that apply to international students in Canada
- Canada Revenue Agency

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
